projects.name: MTD Dashboard & KPI Matrix Data Integrity Audit
projects.description: Verify all MTD dashboard and KPI matrix values come from the DB and match. Document the full data flow (how DB is filled, how dashboards read from it). Update the automation/status dashboard to explain the pipeline. Phase out old CSV-based version once DB version is verified correct and auto-updating.
